name: Mindbody Fitness & Wellness API
what_it_does: Mindbody API for fitness and wellness business management. Enables programmatic access to class schedules, client bookings, appointments, staff, memberships, and payment data for gyms, yoga studios, spas, and wellness businesses. Powers thousands of fitness and wellness apps.
use_cases: Querying class schedules and availability from fitness booking automation agents
Retrieving client booking history and membership status from wellness CRM agents
Managing appointment bookings and cancellations from studio automation agents
Accessing staff schedules and business analytics from fitness business reporting agents
not_for: Consumer fitness tracking (Mindbody is business management, not consumer fitness)
best_when: A fitness studio, gym, or wellness business using Mindbody wants AI agents to manage bookings, query client data, and automate studio operations.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Client health and wellness data is sensitive. FINANCIAL RISK: Autonomous booking modifications affect client schedules and business revenue. Requires careful governance.

auth.notes: Mindbody API key + Site ID authentication. Requires Mindbody developer account. API keys managed per business site. Staff authorization tokens for protected endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Mindbody API requires approved developer account; Mindbody subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Mindbody pricing varies by business size and features
pricing.notes: Mindbody subscription required for businesses. API access for developers requires separate application and approval.

performance.rate_limits: Mindbody API: 15,000 requests/day per API key (standard); higher tiers available

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Client health, fitness, and wellness data requires careful handling
FINANCIAL RISK: Booking modifications affect client schedules and studio revenue
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Staff auth tokens required for protected endpoints — separate from API key
Daily rate limits of 15,000 requests — plan high-volume queries accordingly
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Client wellness and health data. PCI-DSS for payment data. HIPAA considerations for health information. Staff auth tokens required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Client wellness and health data. PCI-DSS for payments. HIPAA for health information. Dual auth model (API key + staff tokens).
